effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌扣置于你装备区里的【木牛流马】下，然后可以将此牌移动至一名装备区里没有宝物牌的其他角色的装备区；你可以将此牌下的牌如手牌般使用或打出。
effect_en: Once per turn during your action phase, you may place one card face down under [Wooden Ox and Flowing Horse] in your equipment zone, and then choose to move this card to the equipment zone of another character who does not have any treasure cards in their equipment zone; you may use or play the cards under this card as if they were in your hand.

faq.a_cn: 不算。它们不在你的手牌中，因此不受顺手牵羊（对标手牌时）或过河拆桥的影响，除非对方选择弃掉你的装备。
faq.q_en: Do the cards in 'Reserve' count as hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. They are not in your hand and are unaffected by skills targeting hand cards. They are lost only if the Wooden Ox itself is discarded or stolen.

faq.q_cn: 我可以一次性把所有“储备”牌都传给下一个人吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。当你把木牛流马传给别人时，所有的“储备”牌都会一并移交给那个人。
faq.q_en: Can I transfer all 'Reserve' cards at once?
faq.a_en: Yes. When you pass the Wooden Ox to another player, all cards currently in the 'Reserve' are transferred to them.

faq.q_cn: 如果我没有仿牌，可以移动给别人吗？
faq.q_en: Can i move the granary without putting any card
faq.a_en: No. you can only choose to move the granary after putting a card.
